Produces Steam which can be fed to Steam Turbines, Steam Compressors, and Pressurized Steam Pipes. Make sure to feed it fuel and water!
block.steamturbine.pressure_pipe.tooltip: Holds Steam from other machines. Use it along with a Pressurized Steam Pump to connect machines together.
block.steamturbine.steam_compressor.tool: Uses rotational force to compress Steam to have higher pressure and throughput. Place it between Steam Boilers and Steam Turbines.
block.steamturbine.steam_turbine.tooltip: Consumes Steam to generate power which is sent to the Steam Turbine Shaft. You can chain 10 of these together for higher SU.
block.steamturbine.turbine_shaft.tooltip: Generates SU from chained Steam Turbines.
block.steamturbine.steam_pump.tooltip.su: Pulls steam from all connected Pressurized Steam Pipes into one direction.
block.steamturbine.lava_duct_turbine.too: Generates SU based on how many faces are touching lava. Each face touching lava produces 475 SU. Place below a Lava Duct Shaft and stack multiple turbines up to 5 max.
block.steamturbine.lava_duct_shaft.toolt: Collects SU from Lava Duct Turbines placed below it. Outputs kinetic power and requires continuous water supply from its EAST face.
